_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to provide effective project management.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.490), LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.469). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, effective, management, project, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.904, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to provide effective project management." and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.495 ≈ STS 0.469 (gap 0.026). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, effective, management, project, provide]. WIDAI terms: [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution].
